title: West Surrey and Hampshire: abdominal aortic aneurysm screening
body: "Quality assurance visits are carried out by the Public Health England screening quality assurance service (SQAS).  The evidence for this report comes from:   routine monitoring data collected by the NHS screening programmes data and reports from external organisations as appropriate evidence submitted by the provider, commissioner and external organisations as appropriate information shared with the south regional SQAS as part of the visit process   "
